name: Periapt of Wound Closure
description: While wearing this pendant, you gain the following benefits.

life_preservation.effect: Whenever you make a Death Saving Throw, you can change a roll of 9 or lower to a 10, turning a failed save into a successful one

natural_healing_boost.effect: Whenever you roll a Hit Point Die to regain Hit Points, double the number of Hit Points it restores
